message:
chore(beads): update UX audit task statuses and add implementation comments

Track completion of Premium UX Polish tasks implemented in this session:

## Tasks Completed (Status: closed)
- phage_explorer-milk: Unified Skeleton component system
- phage_explorer-7hlh: SequenceView skeleton loader
- phage_explorer-8mek: DataLoadingOverlay empty state fix

## Documentation Comments Added
Detailed self-documenting implementation guidance added to:

- phage_explorer-1cwn: Touch target 44px audit methodology
  - WCAG 2.5.5 requirements
  - Audit methodology (identify, measure, document)
  - Three fix strategies (visual size, hit area expansion, invisible expander)
  - Testing checklist

- phage_explorer-2dzx: Interaction feedback enhancement
  - Premium app comparisons (Linear, Stripe)
  - Unified timing token CSS variables
  - Button/list item/overlay feedback states
  - Success criteria checklist

- phage_explorer-7hlh: SequenceView skeleton loader
  - Problem statement with file:line reference
  - SequenceViewSkeleton component design
  - 200ms delay pattern to prevent flash
  - ARIA accessibility requirements

These comments ensure future implementers have full context,
reasoning, code examples, and file paths needed to complete
the work without additional research.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
